response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional depth in full-stack development across multiple languages and domains, with strong evidence of architectural thinking, AI-agent work, and open-source contributions that align with the role’s needs — though his resume spans 30+ years, raising questions about recent focus on modern tooling like Nest.js and Vitest, and his German language limitation may impact collaboration in a Berlin-based team.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools
Proven AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework contributions
Strong open-source portfolio and testing/DevOps practices (Docker, GitLab, CI/CD)
concerns: Lack of explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in skills or experience
Resume spans 30+ years; unclear if recent work aligns with modern enterprise tooling
Basic German proficiency may hinder daily collaboration in Berlin-based team
